obligations.regulation: SEBI Circular on Intraday borrowing facility availed by mutual funds (July 10, 2026)
obligations.action: Ensure intraday borrowings are availed only for permitted purposes: unitholder pay-outs (redemptions, IDCW, interest), investment pay-ins, MTM obligations, foreign exchange settlements, and repayment of existing borrowings.
obligations.evidence: Borrowing logs, transaction records, and utilization reports showing the purpose of borrowing.

obligations.regulation: SEBI Circular on Intraday borrowing facility availed by mutual funds (July 10, 2026)
obligations.action: Limit the quantum of intraday borrowings to guaranteed receivables, sighted non-guaranteed receivables, or additional amounts solely for meeting redemption and other unitholder pay-outs under Regulation 42(1).
obligations.evidence: Daily borrowing limit monitoring reports and receivable tracking sheets.

obligations.regulation: SEBI Circular on Intraday borrowing facility availed by mutual funds (July 10, 2026)
obligations.action: Repay all intraday borrowings by the end of the day, and ensure any conversions to overnight borrowings are within regulatory limits and for allowed purposes under Regulation 42(1).
obligations.evidence: End-of-day bank statements, repayment logs, and overnight borrowing compliance reports.

obligations.regulation: SEBI Circular on Intraday borrowing facility availed by mutual funds (July 10, 2026)
obligations.action: Formulate and obtain approval from the Boards of AMC and Trustees for the policy on the use of intraday borrowing facility, including approval processes and monitoring mechanisms.
obligations.evidence: Board and Trustee meeting minutes, and the approved Intraday Borrowing Policy document.

obligations.regulation: SEBI Circular on Intraday borrowing facility availed by mutual funds (July 10, 2026)
obligations.action: Publish the approved intraday borrowing policy on the website of the AMC.
obligations.evidence: AMC Website screenshot and active URL showing the published policy.

obligations.regulation: SEBI Circular on Intraday borrowing facility availed by mutual funds (July 10, 2026)
obligations.action: Maintain scheme-wise records detailing the underlying liquidity mismatch and the expected source of repayment for each intraday borrowing.
obligations.evidence: Scheme-wise intraday borrowing registers, liquidity mismatch analysis reports, and repayment source documentation.

obligations.regulation: SEBI Circular on Intraday borrowing facility availed by mutual funds (July 10, 2026)
obligations.action: Ensure compliance with clauses 6 and 7 of the Fourth Schedule of SEBI (Mutual Funds) Regulations, 2026, and para 17.7 of the Master Circular.
obligations.evidence: Compliance certificates and internal audit reports.

obligations.regulation: SEBI Circular on Intraday borrowing facility availed by mutual funds (July 10, 2026)
obligations.action: Ensure that the cost of intraday borrowing, as well as any loss or cost incurred due to unforeseen events or delays in receiving funds from receivables, is borne solely by the AMC and not charged to the schemes.
obligations.evidence: Scheme expense ledgers, AMC financial statements, and invoice/payment records showing costs charged to AMC books.
